title: hieracium bifidum subsp. oedocephalum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. oedocephalum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family that is native to mountainous regions in Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. oedocephalum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a supplement or used topically to soothe skin irritations.
